## Summary

Update **Zcore-Landing** CTA links to point to the live dapp production URL.

---

## Problem

Landing page may still reference old or localhost URLs. The dapp is deployed at:

- **Production:** https://zcore-xi.vercel.app (alias of `dapp-zcore`)
- **API:** https://zcore-api.vercel.app

---

## Tasks

1. Find all CTA / "Launch App" / "Get Started" links in the landing repo (`Zcore-Landing` or equivalent)
2. Replace with `https://zcore-xi.vercel.app` (or canonical domain once custom domain is set)
3. Verify Open Graph / meta links if they reference the dapp

---

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Primary CTA opens live dapp (not localhost, not dead link)
- [ ] Footer/docs links consistent
- [ ] Change documented in landing README or changelog

---

## Note

If landing lives in a separate repo, this issue tracks that repo's PR. Link the PR here when done.

---

## Out of scope

- Dapp UI changes (this repo)
